objective: Seed and execute a full-contract Agent Builder Self-Knowledge System that can describe Builder from repo artifacts and distinguish proven, completed, active, candidate, planned, failed, unknown, and missing_surface states.
human_meaning: Builder gains a durable repo-native memory surface for who it is, what it contains, what is evidenced, what is missing, what agents or agent-like products exist, and what the next strongest move should be.
forbidden: Do not create Operation System as completed.
Do not create Blueprint Compiler as completed.
Do not mark missing systems as proven.
Do not delete or rewrite historical proofs or reports.
Do not collapse old roadmap history.
Do not create an external agent directly.
Do not touch Ruflo or external mining.
Do not use minimal, starter, or MVP framing.
expected_report: Whether ready for terminal proof check
No runtime PASS claim unless APPLY.ps1 actually ran

commands: $Continue = $true; foreach ($p in @('CAPABILITY_ROADMAP.json','GENESIS_STATE.json','TASK_QUEUE.json','packs/registry.json','orchestrator/run.ps1')) { if (-not (Test-Path $p)) { Write-Host 'STOP=WRONG_AGENT_BUILDER_REPO'; $Continue = $false } }; if ($Continue) { Write-Host 'REPO_IDENTITY_GATE=PASS' }

$files = @('modules/build_builder_self_knowledge.ps1','modules/write_builder_self_describe_report.ps1','packs/PHASE78_AGENT_BUILDER_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_SYSTEM_FULL_CONTRACT_V1/APPLY.ps1','packs/PHASE78_AGENT_BUILDER_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_SYSTEM_FULL_CONTRACT_V1/VALIDATE.ps1'); foreach ($f in $files) { $tokens=$null; $errors=$null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile((Resolve-Path $f), [ref]$tokens, [ref]$errors) | Out-Null; if ($errors.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host "PARSER_FAIL=$f"; $errors } else { Write-Host "PARSER_PASS=$f" } }
